# Maximum Social

> Reputation and customer engagement platform for local businesses: AI review replies, smart rating routing, SMS/email campaigns, and content publishing — built as a full-stack AI portfolio demo.

## Pages

- [Landing](/landing): Product overview, features, and pricing.
- [Interactive demo](/demo): Sign in to a shared demo workspace seeded with realistic data.
- [About this demo](/about-this-demo): How the app was built, where the AI lives, and the stack used.

## Legal

- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of Maximum Social.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How user and customer data is handled.
- [Refund & Cancellation Policy](/refunds): Subscription billing, cancellation, and refund rules.
- [SMS Consent & TCPA Disclosure](/sms-consent): SMS program disclosures and consent.
- [SMS Compliance](/sms-compliance): A2P 10DLC and carrier compliance details.
